title: How Flagler College and St. Johns County Use Storytelling Video to Build Community Trust
excerpt: Institutions rooted in a specific place face a unique communication challenge: the community already has opinions about you. Here's how storytelling video builds and maintains community trust over time.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Brand story video production in St. Augustine Florida

content.alt: Community gathering at St. Johns County cultural event
content.caption: Community trust is built over time through consistent, honest communication

seo.title: Flagler College & St. Johns County Storytelling Video
seo.description: How Flagler College and St. Johns County use storytelling video to build community trust. Documentary-style production for Northeast Florida institutions.
